commit_message:
V3Randomize: Fix dist operator inside ConstraintIf blocks (#7221) V3Randomize: Fix dist operator inside ConstraintIf blocks (#7221) The lowerDistConstraints() function was not recursing into ConstraintIf nodes, causing dist operators inside if-else blocks to remain unlowered and trigger an internal error when ConstraintExprVisitor encountered them.

Fix by adding recursive handling of ConstraintIf nodes in lowerDistConstraints:
- Check for AstConstraintIf nodes before AstConstraintExpr
- Rec

Fix by adding recursive handling of ConstraintIf nodes in lowerDistConstraints:
- Check for AstConstraintIf nodes before AstConstraintExpr
- Rec
